title: MC Dungeons Map Maker
description: Ever wanted to make your own mc dungeons themed map? well this mod pack is pefrect for you!
body:
What dose this mod add -

Mostly the basics from dungeons such as: Blocks, Weapons, Mobs, Gui, functions and also fun twists to 

+ Why our mod? -

Monthly updates, discord community and other additions such as voted in features and collabs

+ Other things before you download -

This pack is very buggy, work is being made to fix it so no pressure
